news.headline: Stocks to Watch: Strategy, Tesla, JBS, Paramount
news.snippet: ↗️ Strategy (MSTR), Coinbase (COIN): The crypto-related stocks jumped on the back of gains for bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. ↗️ JBS (JBS): Shares in the world's largest meatpacker rose after its workers in Colorado agreed to end a three-week strike.

news.headline: Strategy Resumes Bitcoin Buying With $330 Million Purchase. The Stock Jumps.
news.snippet: The company formerly known as MicroStrategy discloses a purchase of 4,871 Bitcoin following a brief pause.

news.headline: Strategy Records a $14.5 Billion Unrealized Loss in First Quarter
news.snippet: Strategy, the bitcoin accumulation firm founded by Michael Saylor, recorded a $14.5 billion unrealized loss in the first quarter after a sharp decline in the value of its bitcoin stash.  Strategy adopted a fair value accounting standard last year that requires companies holding digital assets to show the fair value of their cryptocurrencies on their balance sheets at the end of each quarter.  The change has driven wild swings in Strategy’s earnings, with the company reporting a $12.4 billion net loss in the fourth quarter.

news.headline: Michael Saylor Says 'Bitcoin Has Won'
news.snippet: Strategy Executive Chairman, Michael Saylor on Saturday declared that Bitcoin's old four-year rhythm no longer explains price action, arguing that money moving into the asset—shaped by banks and digital credit—now matters more. The claim lands as Strategy's Bitcoin playbook shows...

news.headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Seagate, Micron, Tesla, Kratos, Strategy, Soleno, Viridian, and More
news.snippet: Seagate Technology stock jumps after Morgan Stanley names the maker of hard disk drives its ‘top pick,’ replacing Western Digital.

news.headline: Bitcoin jumps 4% to hover near $70,000 on hopes of ceasefire deal
news.snippet: Bitcoin jumped roughly 4% to $70,000 as markets looked toward the possibility of a ceasefire between the US and Iran.

news.headline: Bitcoin, XRP Prices Rise. Why Strategy Can Give Cryptos a Bigger Boost.
news.snippet: Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies advanced on Monday, bucking days of stagnant trading after Strategy—one of the most significant digital asset market participants—suggested they may resume a buying spree.  The price of  Bitcoin  rose 3% over the past 24 hours to above $69,000, its highest point in nearly two weeks.  The largest crypto by market value has languished around or below $70,000 since February, the latest stage of declines that have taken Bitcoin down from late-2025 highs above $125,000.

news.headline: Bitcoin Rebounds Near $70,000, Charles Schwab To Launch Direct Trading
news.snippet: Bitcoin price jumps above $69,000 amid Iran war ceasefire discussions, short liquidations. Charles Schwab to launch direct crypto trading.

news.headline: Investors Heavily Search Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN): Here is What You Need to Know
news.snippet: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Coinbase Global (COIN) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

news.headline: BlackRock Is Coming for the Most Profitable ETF Monopoly on Wall Street: Why It Could Win
news.snippet: BlackRock filed a Nasdaq-100 ETF to challenge Invesco's QQQ. Here are 7 reasons it could win and what stands in its way.
